title: Closed: Permanent residence for Ukrainian nationals with family members in Canada - Apply for, extend work or study permit - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for an open work permit, study permit or to extend your stay in Canada as a temporary resident
If you submitted or were included in an application for the permanent residence pathway for Ukrainian nationals with family members in Canada, you may be able to apply for
- to stay in Canada longer as a temporary resident
This new public policy will let you work, study or stay in Canada longer as a temporary resident while your permanent residence application is being processed.
- for a new open work permit
- to extend your open work permit, or
- to restore your status and apply for a work permit
Apply
				for a work permit
Apply for a new study permit under this public policy.
Apply for a study permit

### Extend my study permit
Apply to extend your study permit through our regular application process if you currently hold a valid study
			permit.
Extend your study permit

### Restore my status and apply for a study permit
If you lost your status less than 90 days ago, you may be able to apply to restore it and get a study permit through our regular application process.
Restore
				my status
You may be eligible to restore your status and apply for a new study permit under this public policy if at the time we received the permanent residence application you
- had valid temporary resident status, or
- were out of status for less than 90 days
Deadline If your status expired more than 90 days ago, you must
				apply to restore it on or before March 31, 2026 .
Apply
					for a study permit under the public policy

### Extend my stay as a visitor
Apply to extend your visitor status through our regular application process if you
- currently have valid temporary resident status
- are not applying for a work or study permit

### Restore my status as a temporary resident
If you lost your temporary resident status less than 90 days ago, you may be eligible to apply to restore it through our regular application process.
How to restore my status
You may be eligible to restore your status under this public policy if at the time we received the permanent residence application, you
- had valid temporary resident status, or
- were out of status for less than 90 days
Deadline If your status expired more than 90 days ago, you must apply to restore it on or before March 31, 2026 .
Restore your status under the public policy
